changes: The orders protection trigger is dropped only inside the database upgrade transaction before historical order rows are normalized.
The orders protection trigger is recreated after the migration and readiness verifies that it exists.
A failed migration rolls back transactionally and cannot leave the orders table unprotected.
Courier status constraints and workflow timestamps remain part of the canonical database migration.
notes: Do not rerun the v2.1.7 SQL file. Run v2.1.8 from the beginning.
